Properties
  NameDescription
ErrorMessage
IsAuthenticated
Returns a flag indicating if the second authentication factor has succeeded.
IsEnabled
Returns a flag indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled. If this value is false, two-factor authentication is not required.
Name
Returns the name of the two-factor authentication provider.
